title: Computer Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Computer Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To educate graduates who possess strong theoretical and practical knowledge in Computer Engineering, and who are قادر of analyzing and solving engineering problems.

2. To educate engineers who adhere to professional and ethical values, and who are aware of their economic and societal responsibilities.

3. To educate graduates who can contribute to research and development activities in contemporary areas of computer science, particularly in health informatics, as well as artificial intelligence, data mining, signal processing, and image processing.

4. To educate engineers who can work effectively in interdisciplinary environments, and who possess strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and leadership skills.

5. To educate individuals who can keep up with rapid technological advancements in computer science and who have a strong awareness of lifelong learning.
